P(C1).description: Probability that firm 1 gives 'stay competitive' as the primary reason for using diversity training, based on the survey finding that 38% of U.S. firms use diversity training to stay competitive.

P(C2).description: Probability that firm 2 gives 'stay competitive' as the primary reason for using diversity training, based on the survey finding that 38% of U.S. firms use diversity training to stay competitive.
